name: Old-Fashioned Apple Butter C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine apples, sugar, allspice, and cloves in a large pot.
2. Cook on high heat for 6 to 8 hours, removing the cover after 3 hours.
3. Apple butter is done when no liquid runs from the edge of a spoonful placed in a saucer.
4. Allow to cool completely before storing in the refrigerator.
5. Use within a few weeks or freeze in pint containers for longer storage.
